standard_live_change.description: Routine live mutation that may be requested by an agent or operator, but still requires human approval and evidence planning.

low_risk_secret_rotation.description: Scoped secret rotation for a cataloged low-risk credential where the requester may satisfy the approval gate directly through the governed command contract.

sensitive_live_change.description: Higher-risk host, provisioning, security, or boundary-changing mutation that must stay operator-initiated and human-approved.

install-proxmox.description: Install and converge the Proxmox package path on the Debian host.

inputs.name: bootstrap_ssh_private_key
inputs.description: Controller-side SSH key used to reach the host as ops.

expected_preconditions: make preflight WORKFLOW=install-proxmox passes
make validate passes on the repo state being applied
The host is reachable and the change window is approved before package mutation starts

evidence.notes: Record the source commit, pveversion verification, and any package or reboot observations.

stop_conditions: Stop immediately if preflight, apt repository setup, or package installation fails.
Stop if post-apply verification does not show the expected Proxmox version.
rollback_guidance: Do not continue with later host mutations until the package path is stable.
Revert by reapplying the last known-good repo state or follow the Proxmox install runbook for host recovery.

configure-network.description: Converge the host bridge, forwarding, and NAT model for guest networking.

inputs.name: bootstrap_ssh_private_key
inputs.description: Controller-side SSH key for the host network converge.

expected_preconditions: make preflight WORKFLOW=configure-network passes
make validate passes before the apply
Operators confirm the host networking blast radius and guest outage tolerance

evidence.notes: Record the source commit plus verification of vmbr0, vmbr10, forwarding, and guest egress behavior.

stop_conditions: Stop if interface rendering, nftables update, or connectivity verification fails.
Stop if the host loses expected management reachability during the change.
rollback_guidance: Restore the last known-good network configuration from version control before retrying.
Use documented host access recovery steps instead of ad hoc retries if management access degrades.

converge-guest-network-policy.description: Converge the default-deny guest network policy on the Proxmox host and all managed guests.

inputs.name: bootstrap_ssh_private_key
inputs.description: Controller-side SSH key used for the host and guest firewall converge.

expected_preconditions: make preflight WORKFLOW=converge-guest-network-policy passes
make validate passes before the apply
The canonical allow matrix in inventory/host_vars/proxmox_florin.yml is reviewed before the maintenance window

evidence.notes: Record the source commit, generated VM firewall files, SSH reconnect results, and at least one allowed-flow plus one blocked-flow verification.

stop_conditions: Stop if pve-firewall compile fails, guest nftables validation fails, or SSH reconnect fails after a guest policy reload.
Stop if verification shows an allowed service path is blocked or a denied lateral path is still reachable.
rollback_guidance: Restore the last known-good firewall policy from version control before retrying the live converge.
If guest access degrades, repair from the Proxmox host jump path or documented break-glass access before changing application surfaces.

configure-ingress.description: Converge host-side public ingress forwarding to the NGINX VM.

inputs.name: bootstrap_ssh_private_key
inputs.description: Controller-side SSH key for host ingress changes.

expected_preconditions: make preflight WORKFLOW=configure-ingress passes
make validate passes before the apply
The NGINX guest is healthy enough to receive forwarded public traffic

evidence.notes: Record the forwarding change and verification for TCP 80 and 443 to nginx-lv3.

stop_conditions: Stop if forwarding rules fail to render or verification shows traffic is no longer reaching the edge VM.
Stop if firewall or NAT changes affect unrelated management traffic.
rollback_guidance: Restore the last known-good ingress rule set before attempting another live change.
Do not layer DNS or edge-publication changes on top of a broken host ingress state.

configure-edge-publication.description: Publish repo-managed public hostnames and routes at the NGINX edge.

inputs.name: bootstrap_ssh_private_key
inputs.description: Controller-side SSH key used through the Proxmox jump path.

expected_preconditions: make preflight WORKFLOW=configure-edge-publication passes
make validate passes before the apply
Service topology and DNS intent are already represented in repo-managed data

evidence.notes: Record the source commit and HTTP or HTTPS verification for the affected public hostnames.

stop_conditions: Stop if NGINX config validation or publication verification fails.
Stop if certificate or hostname mismatches appear after the change.
rollback_guidance: Reapply the last known-good edge configuration from version control.
Keep failed publication attempts out of DNS or user-facing announcements until verification is clean.

configure-tailscale.description: Converge host Tailscale installation and subnet-router behavior.

expected_preconditions: make preflight WORKFLOW=configure-tailscale passes

stop_conditions: Stop if package installation, auth state, or route advertisement fails.
Stop if the change removes expected private management access.
rollback_guidance: Return to the last known-good Tailscale configuration before further access changes.
Use documented break-glass access only long enough to restore the managed state.

stop_conditions: Stop if template preparation, VM create or update, or cloud-init refresh fails.
Stop if guest identity drift such as MAC or static-network mismatch is detected.
rollback_guidance: Do not keep partially converged guest identity changes without documenting the repair path.
Restore the prior guest definition or follow the netplan MAC-drift runbook before retrying.

stop_conditions: Stop if SSH or sudo verification fails after the converge.
Stop if the change would strand operators outside the documented break-glass path.
rollback_guidance: Restore the last known-good access model from the repo before retrying.
Use the documented break-glass account only to recover the managed access path.

Document any guest-specific repair needed instead of masking access drift with root logins.

make validate passes before apply mode
The selected SECRET_ID is classified as low-risk and approval_mode auto in config/secret-catalog.json.rotation_contracts

stop_conditions: Stop if the selected secret id is not cataloged or resolves to a high-risk secret.

rollback_guidance: Rerun the same secret id deliberately instead of improvising ad hoc secret writes.
Treat any failure between service mutation and OpenBao persistence as a partial rotation incident that must be reconciled explicitly.

make validate passes before the apply
The topology catalog already represents the intended private DNS record

evidence.notes: Record the published DNS record plus verification that the managed tailnet hostname resolves as expected.

stop_conditions: Stop if the Hetzner API request fails or the resulting record does not match the repo state.
Stop if the change would replace the intended private-only DNS target with a broader exposure.
rollback_guidance: Reapply the last known-good DNS state from the repo before retrying.
Keep private database publication changes under the managed playbook instead of manual provider edits.

open-maintenance-window.description: Open one governed ADR 0080 maintenance window for a planned live change so expected alert noise is suppressed.

inputs.name: bootstrap_ssh_private_key
inputs.description: Controller-side SSH key used to reach the private docker-runtime-lv3 NATS runtime through the Proxmox jump path.

inputs.name: nats_jetstream_admin_password
inputs.description: Controller-local password for the private NATS JetStream admin principal currently used to create or inspect the maintenance-windows bucket.

inputs.name: SERVICE
inputs.description: Service id to suppress, for example grafana, windmill, or all.

inputs.name: REASON
inputs.description: Planned change reason recorded inside the maintenance window payload.

inputs.name: DURATION_MINUTES
inputs.description: Expected window duration in minutes, capped operationally by the bucket max age.

expected_preconditions: make preflight WORKFLOW=open-maintenance-window passes
make validate passes before the window is opened
The affected service and planned downtime reason are already known before the live mutation begins

evidence.notes: Record the service id, reason, expected duration, and verification that the window is visible through the governed maintenance-window query surface.

stop_conditions: Stop if the private NATS KV bucket cannot be reached or the maintenance window cannot be written.
Stop if the requested window would suppress the wrong service or an unreviewed all-services blast radius.
rollback_guidance: Close the maintenance window immediately if the downstream live change is cancelled.
Do not proceed with the planned mutation until the suppression state matches the intended service scope.

close-maintenance-window.description: Close one governed ADR 0080 maintenance window when planned maintenance ends or is cancelled.

inputs.name: bootstrap_ssh_private_key
inputs.description: Controller-side SSH key used to reach the private docker-runtime-lv3 NATS runtime through the Proxmox jump path.

inputs.name: nats_jetstream_admin_password
inputs.description: Controller-local password for the private NATS JetStream admin principal currently used to inspect or remove maintenance-window state.

inputs.name: SERVICE
inputs.description: Service id to close, or all when a force-close is required.

inputs.name: FORCE
inputs.description: Set FORCE=true only when intentionally closing all active maintenance windows or recovering from a stale suppression state.

expected_preconditions: make preflight WORKFLOW=close-maintenance-window passes
make validate passes before the close is attempted
Operators confirm the planned change has finished, been cancelled, or needs a deliberate force-close

evidence.notes: Record the service id, whether force-close was used, and the resulting governed maintenance-window query output.

stop_conditions: Stop if the private NATS KV bucket cannot be reached or the targeted window cannot be removed.
Stop if the request would leave the intended service suppressed after the change window should be over.
rollback_guidance: Re-open the correct service-scoped maintenance window if an accidental close happens mid-change.
Prefer a scoped close over FORCE=true unless the active suppression state is already wrong.
